ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( (CONTAINS(Settlement_Number__c,"SA")), NOT(CONTAINS(Last_Modified_By__c,"@")), (OR( ISCHANGED(Product__c),ISCHANGED(Approved_Date_Text__c), ISCHANGED(Rejected_Date_Text__c), ISCHANGED(Employment__c),ISCHANGED(Homeowner_Status__c), ISCHANGED(Employment_Comments__c), ISCHANGED(HomeOwner_Status_Comments__c), ISCHANGED(Monthly_Income__c),ISCHANGED(Monthly_Expenses__c), ISCHANGED(Monthly_Income_Comments__c), ISCHANGED(Monthly_Expenses_Comments__c), ISCHANGED(Total_Wealth__c),ISCHANGED(Total_Wealth_Comments__c) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The field will not change because settlement created by Portal
